compressed_prompt: Write a short and funny joke about a guy who works at the IRS. Include at least one placeholder represented by square brackets.
response:
Here’s a quick one for you:

A guy walks into an IRS office and says, *"I haven’t filed my taxes in years—am I in trouble?"*
The IRS agent smiles and says, *"Oh, don’t worry, [name of coworker] here hasn’t *audited* anyone in years—you’re fine!"*

*(Bonus points if [name of coworker] is the office slacker.)* 😆
